## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on integration pages progress, editorial content, and implementation updates for Webflow \<\> GrowthX collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/2zJbEHDkVLacefQC34A2eQD-MTfn4sBh?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

  - [35 integration pages ready for review; 15 more coming this week](https://fathom.video/share/2zJbEHDkVLacefQC34A2eQD-MTfn4sBh?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
